================================================================================
KEY DELIVERABLES
================================================================================

EXECUTION PLAN:
✓ 3-week roadmap with 21 business days of detailed tasks
✓ Week 7: Launch sales blitz (75+ touches, 4 discovery calls)
✓ Week 8: Accelerate discovery (10+ calls, 2 demos scheduled)
✓ Week 9: Close deals (2 demos, 2 proposals, Customer #2 closing)

PIPELINE MANAGEMENT:
✓ 50-prospect target list with ICP scoring
✓ Cold outreach strategy across 3 verticals:
  - Cloud Infrastructure/CPaaS (21 companies, $200K avg ACV)
  - Fintech/Finance (17 companies, $165K avg ACV)
  - SaaS/E-commerce (12 companies, $145K avg ACV)
✓ Discovery process with 20 qualifying questions
✓ Deal tracking & revenue forecasting

SALES ACCELERATION:
✓ Email & LinkedIn outreach templates
✓ Demo scripts for Customers #2 & #3
✓ ROI calculators with vertical-specific value props
✓ Negotiation frameworks & objection handling
✓ Case study materials from Customer #1 implementation

TEAM ENABLEMENT:
✓ Roles & responsibilities matrix
✓ Daily/weekly execution guides
✓ Weekly review checkpoints
✓ Escalation & decision paths
✓ Contingency plans for common blockers

================================================================================
EXPECTED OUTCOMES
================================================================================

IMMEDIATE (Week 7-9):
• 150+ cold outreach touches across 50-company list
• 30+ discovery calls conducted
• 5+ new POC candidates identified & qualified
• Customer #2 demo → proposal → contract negotiation
• Customer #3 demo → proposal → early negotiation
• $300K+ ARR identified in pipeline
• Case study finalized from Customer #1

REVENUE IMPACT:
• Customer #2 ACV: $150K-$300K (85% close probability)
• Customer #3 ACV: $150K-$200K (70% close probability)
• Target signatures: Week 9 (C#2 likely) or Week 10 (fully expected)
• 3-month forecast: $900K-$1.2M (5-7 customers)

STRATEGIC VALUE:
• Proven repeatable sales playbook for 10-100 customers
• Strong case study creates social proof for future sales
• Sales team gains 3 complete deal cycles (discovery → close)
• Investor-ready metrics showing product-market fit

================================================================================
WEEK-BY-WEEK TIMELINE
================================================================================

WEEK 7: LAUNCH SALES BLITZ
├─ Day 1-2: Prepare target list, email templates, warm intros
├─ Day 3-4: Launch campaign (75+ touches)
├─ Day 5-7: Discovery calls begin (4 calls, prospect scoring)
└─ Checkpoint: 75+ touches, 3-4 calls, 2-3 qualified prospects

WEEK 8: ACCELERATE DISCOVERY
├─ Day 8-10: Discovery call blitz (7-8 calls)
├─ Day 11-13: Finalize demo scripts, research, ROI models
├─ Day 14: Final readiness check
└─ Checkpoint: 10+ calls, 5-6 qualified, 2 demos confirmed

WEEK 9: CLOSE & NEGOTIATE
├─ Day 15: Customer #2 demo delivered
├─ Day 16: Customer #3 demo delivered
├─ Day 17-18: Follow-ups, proposals sent
├─ Day 20-21: Negotiation finalization, signature push
└─ Checkpoint: Demos done, proposals sent, C#2 closing

WEEK 10+: MOMENTUM CONTINUES
├─ Customer #2 & #3 implementation begins
├─ Additional customers from Week 7-9 pipeline close
└─ Forecast: $900K-$1.2M revenue over 3 months

================================================================================
KEY METRICS TO TRACK
================================================================================

OUTREACH PERFORMANCE (SDRs):
Target: 150+ touches | 8-10% response rate | 5-7 calls booked
└─ Week 7: 75+ touches
└─ Week 8: 50+ touches
└─ Week 9: 25+ touches

DISCOVERY PERFORMANCE (AEs):
Target: 10+ calls | 5-6 qualified | 75+ ICP scores
└─ Week 7: 4 calls, 2-3 qualified
└─ Week 8: 7-8 calls, 3-4 qualified
└─ Week 9: 0 calls (focus on demos/closes)

DEAL CLOSURE:
Target: 2 demos, 2 proposals, Customer #2 closing
└─ Week 9 Day 15: Customer #2 demo
└─ Week 9 Day 16: Customer #3 demo
└─ Week 9 Day 18: Customer #2 proposal
└─ Week 9 Day 20: Customer #3 proposal
└─ Week 9-10: Customer #2 signature

PIPELINE VALUE:
└─ Identified: $8.5M (all 50 prospects)
└─ Qualified: $1.2M (top 5-6 prospects)
└─ Immediate: $300K+ (Customers #2-3)
└─ 90-day forecast: $900K-$1.2M

================================================================================
TEAM ASSIGNMENTS
================================================================================

SALES DEVELOPMENT TEAM (2-3 people):
├─ Cold outreach (150+ touches)
├─ Initial qualification & call booking
└─ CRM tracking & activity logging

ACCOUNT EXECUTIVES (1-2 people):
├─ Discovery calls (10+ conducted)
├─ Demo delivery (2 scheduled)
├─ Proposal development & negotiation
└─ 50% allocated to Customers #2-3

VP SALES (1 person):
├─ Warm intro outreach & relationship nurturing
├─ Deal leadership & negotiation
├─ Weekly pipeline reviews & coaching
└─ 30% allocated to sales expansion

CUSTOMER SUCCESS (1 person):
├─ Customer #1 case study development
├─ Interview & content creation
└─ 20% allocated to sales expansion

MARKETING (1 person):
├─ Sales collateral & templates
├─ Case study review & finalization
└─ 10% allocated to sales expansion

================================================================================

BEFORE WEEK 7 STARTS:
☐ Read WEEK_7_9_SALES_EXPANSION.md (main plan)
☐ Review UPDATED_PIPELINE_TRACKER.csv (50 prospects)
☐ Bookmark SALES_EXPANSION_INDEX.md (navigation)
☐ Team kickoff meeting (confirm roles)
☐ Assign SDRs to prospect lists
☐ Create email templates in CRM

WEEK 7 (Days 1-7):
☐ Launch 75+ outreach touches
☐ Conduct 4 discovery calls
☐ Score prospects against ICP
☐ Complete case study outline
☐ Friday checkpoint: WEEK_7_SALES_SUMMARY.md

WEEK 8 (Days 8-14):
☐ Execute 50+ additional touches
☐ Conduct 7-8 discovery calls
☐ Schedule 2 demos for Week 9
☐ Finalize demo scripts & ROI models
☐ Friday checkpoint: WEEK_8_SALES_SUMMARY.md

WEEK 9 (Days 15-21):
☐ Day 15: Customer #2 demo
☐ Day 16: Customer #3 demo
☐ Day 18: Customer #2 proposal sent
☐ Day 20: Customer #3 proposal sent
☐ Day 20-21: Negotiate Customer #2
☐ Friday checkpoint: WEEK_9_SALES_SUMMARY.md

================================================================================
RISK MITIGATION STRATEGIES
================================================================================

Outreach Response Too Low (< 5%)?
→ Increase SDR volume, improve messaging, leverage warm intros

Discovery Calls Don't Convert?
→ Lower ICP threshold, improve AE techniques, VP Sales joins calls

Demos Not Scheduled by Day 14?
→ Identify backup prospects, fast-track to Week 9

Customer #2 Doesn't Close by Week 9?
→ Move to Week 10 (fully expected), maintain momentum, offer implementation start

Case Study Delayed?
→ Publish teaser early, complete full version by Week 10

================================================================================
SUCCESS CRITERIA
================================================================================

WEEK 7 SUCCESS:
✓ 75+ outreach touches
✓ 3-4 discovery calls
✓ 2-3 qualified prospects
✓ Case study outline complete
✓ No major blockers

WEEK 8 SUCCESS:
✓ 50+ additional touches (125 total)
✓ 10+ discovery calls
✓ 5-6 qualified prospects
✓ 2 demos scheduled
✓ Demo materials finalized

WEEK 9 SUCCESS:
✓ Customer #2 demo delivered
✓ Customer #3 demo delivered
✓ Both proposals sent
✓ Customer #2 contract in negotiation
✓ Customer #3 early negotiation
✓ Case study finalized
✓ $300K+ pipeline documented

================================================================================
INTEGRATION WITH CUSTOMER #1 IMPLEMENTATION
================================================================================

PARALLEL EXECUTION (Weeks 7-9):
• Customer #1: Kickoff → Baseline → Integration → Training → Go-live
• Sales Expansion: Outreach → Discovery → Demos → Negotiation

MUTUAL BENEFITS:
• Customer #1 early wins create proof points for Customers #2-3
• Case study materials feed from Customer #1 success
• Sales momentum validates product-market fit
• Customer #1 reference available for warm intros to similar companies

TIMELINE ALIGNMENT:
• Week 7: Customer #1 baseline + Sales blitz launch
• Week 8: Customer #1 integration + Sales discovery acceleration
• Week 9: Customer #1 go-live + Customer #2-3 demos/proposals
• Week 10: Customer #1 value proven + Customer #2-3 implementation begins

CONTACT & SUPPORT
================================================================================

Questions about execution plan?
→ Contact VP Sales

Technical/demo environment issues?
→ Contact CTO / Technical Lead

Need to escalate blockers?
→ Contact CEO immediately

Questions about case study?
→ Contact Customer Success Manager
